entity.summary: British Virgin Islands-registered centralized cryptocurrency exchange launched in October 2019. Bidesk announced a permanent staged shutdown in September 2021, citing major policy and regulatory changes, and scheduled final platform closure after trading and withdrawal wind-down phases in October.
entity.notes: Launch is stored at month precision from exchange-directory history. Shutdown reporting describes phased deadlines during October 2021; HEI uses 2021-10-23 as the final platform closure date reported in the detailed schedule.

events.title: Bidesk launched
events.description: Bidesk began operating as a centralized cryptocurrency exchange registered in the British Virgin Islands.

events.title: Bidesk permanently shut down
events.description: Bidesk completed a staged permanent shutdown after stopping trading and providing a final withdrawal period in October 2021.
events.notes: The shutdown was announced in late September 2021 and attributed to major policy and regulatory changes.

evidence.title: Bidesk exchange profile and launch history
evidence.notes: Profile records an October 2019 launch and British Virgin Islands registration and notes the permanent shutdown.

evidence.title: Bidesk shuts down
evidence.notes: Reports the permanent shutdown announcement, regulatory-policy context, and October 23 final platform closure.

evidence.title: Bidesk Exchange informs users of permanent shutdown
evidence.notes: Preserves the operator's staged shutdown phases and confirms that the closure was permanent.
